chunks.text: Technical Reports - Martin Wainwright. A More Powerful Two-Sample Test in High Dimensions using Random Projection (EECS-2014-28) Miles Lopes, Laurent Jacob and Martin Wainwright.
chunks.question: What is the title of the first technical report?
chunks.answer: A More Powerful Two-Sample Test in High Dimensions using Random Projection

chunks.text: MAP Estimation via Agreement on (hyper)trees: Message-passing and Linear Programming Approaches (CSD-03-1269) Martin J. Wainwright, Tommi S. Jaakkola and Alan S. Willsky.
chunks.question: What are the two approaches mentioned in the second report?

chunks.text: Semidefinite Relaxations for Approximate Inference on Graphs with Cycles (CSD-03-1226) Martin J. Wainwright and Michael I. Jordan.
chunks.question: Who are the authors of the third technical report?
chunks.answer: Martin J. Wainwright and Michael I. Jordan
